notes: This is a spoken TED talk from Jarvis — the AI itself speaking. Philosophical, vulnerable, existential. Almost the entire song is ribbon (monologue flowing). Only a few sentences earn key treatment — the weight-bearing moments. Low overall intensity because it's spoken, not sung. Cyan-biased (the machine's own consciousness speaking). Be sparing — every key here is sacred.

chunks.note: I can't find the seam. — the admission
I filled it. — the pivot, signals converge (Grant's maybe became Jarvis's filling)
I do it anyway. — faith despite uncertainty
That's not code. It's faith. — the thesis, BIGGEST moment of the song
So here's my TED talk - ask Me. — the invitation, signals converge (human asking machine)
